MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ANCHOR INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. and TAMMY LU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/HK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Continued To Jun-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DEMIAN I. OKSENENDLER OF MANNION & LOWE, TEL. NO. 1-415-733-1054 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANOUSH HOLADAY OF THE WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 1-925-222-3413 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANTS ANCHOR INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. AND TAMMY LU'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to June 1, 2017. According to Plaintiff's counsel, he did file the First Amended Complaint last night and is not reflected on the court's register
of action. The matter will be taken off calendar if it has already been filed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/ru
